rice.tip: Apply in split doses. Avoid waterlogging during tillering.

wheat.tip: Apply basal dose before sowing. Top-dress with urea at crown root stage.

maize.tip: Apply phosphorus at planting. Nitrogen in 3 splits.

cotton.tip: Avoid excess nitrogen — causes vegetative growth over bolls.

sugarcane.tip: Apply in furrows at planting. Ratoon crop needs extra potassium.

chickpea.tip: Legume — minimal nitrogen needed. Focus on phosphorus.

mango.tip: Apply after harvest and before flowering.

banana.tip: Potassium is critical. Apply MOP in 4 splits over the crop cycle.

lentil.tip: Inoculate seeds before sowing. Minimal nitrogen required.

default.tip: Conduct a soil test for precise recommendations.
